name: Peach Upside-Down Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt 3 tablespoons butter in a preheated oven-safe, 8 by 8 inch baking pan.
2. Add 3/4 cup brown sugar and blend until smooth.
3. Place one cherry in the hollow of each peach half.
4. Invert the peach halves into the pan at the corners and center.
5. Cream the remaining 1/3 cup butter with 1/2 cup brown sugar until light and fluffy.
6. Add the egg to the mixture and beat well until combined.
7. Sift together 1 1/4 cups flour, baking soda, cinnamon, ground ginger, ground cloves, salt.
8. Gradually combine 1/2 cup molasses and 1/2 cup boiling water with the dry ingredients into the creamed mixture.
9. Pour the batter carefully over the fruit in the pan.
10. Bake for 45-50 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
11. Allow the cake to stand on a rack for 5 minutes before inverting it onto a serving plate.
12. Remove the baking pan and serve warm with whipped topping.
